# claude_workspaces (Data Source)

Use this data source to list workspaces in the Claude organization.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `include_archived` (Boolean) Whether to include archived workspaces in the results.

### Read-Only

- `workspaces` (Attributes List) The list of workspaces. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--workspaces))

<a id="nestedatt--workspaces"></a>
### Nested Schema for `workspaces`

Read-Only:

- `archived_at` (String) The timestamp when the workspace was archived, if applicable.
- `created_at` (String) The timestamp when the workspace was created.
- `data_residency` (Attributes) The data residency configuration for the workspace. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--workspaces--data_residency))
- `display_color` (String) The display color of the workspace.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the workspace.
- `name` (String) The name of the workspace.

<a id="nestedatt--workspaces--data_residency"></a>
### Nested Schema for `workspaces.data_residency`

Read-Only:

- `allowed_inference_geos` (List of String) The allowed geographic regions for inference.
- `default_inference_geo` (String) The default geographic region for inference.
- `workspace_geo` (String) The geographic region for workspace data.
